//: React 中后台前端平台 Monorepo 根包。所有 workspace 脚本通过 pnpm -F 或根脚本聚合执行。
name: react-admin-monorepo

scripts.build:shared: pnpm --filter @repo/shared build && pnpm --filter @repo/platform-core build && pnpm --filter @repo/design-tokens build && pnpm --filter @repo/resources build && pnpm --filter @repo/mock build && pnpm --filter @repo/ui-react build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @repo/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @repo/platform-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @repo/design-tokens typecheck && pnpm --filter @repo/resources typecheck && pnpm --filter @repo/mock typecheck && pnpm --filter @repo/ui-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @repo/react-app typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm stylelint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm check:alias && pnpm check:status && pnpm check:phase2-consistency && pnpm verify:mock-worker && pnpm test && pnpm test:scripts && pnpm build && pnpm template:check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @repo/shared test && pnpm --filter @repo/platform-core test && pnpm --filter @repo/design-tokens test && pnpm --filter @repo/resources test && pnpm --filter @repo/mock test && pnpm --filter @repo/ui-react test && pnpm --filter @repo/react-app test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @repo/shared test:coverage && pnpm --filter @repo/platform-core test:coverage && pnpm --filter @repo/design-tokens test:coverage && pnpm --filter @repo/resources test:coverage && pnpm --filter @repo/mock test:coverage && pnpm --filter @repo/ui-react test:coverage && pnpm --filter @repo/react-app test:coverage
